description: Defines how agent manages context for different types of user requests. Determines compaction, session persistence, and memory layer behavior.

determination_algorithm.rule: Agent does not wait for explicit marker — determines mode itself from task context.

paths.when_triggered: User explicitly says 'working on project' or sets marker
Agent understands from phrasing that this is iterative work
paths.example: "Migrating auth to JWT → what token rotation schemas?"
"Is this a one-off question or part of a project?"

mode_definitions.name: One-off Reference Question
mode_definitions.context_definition: Short fact, definition, comparison of two terms.
rules: Dismiss all read pages (except snapshot) after answer
Context not carried forward to new session — agent starts with snapshot.md

mode_definitions.name: Deep-dive Topic Study
rules: Retain all previous questions/answers across turns
Context carried forward in working_memory.json to new session

mode_definitions.name: Discussion / Debate
mode_definitions.context_definition: User builds argumentation, agent participates in debate.
rules: No compaction — entire discussion context carried forward in working_memory.json

mode_definitions.name: Project Work
mode_definitions.context_definition: Iterative development, wiki = context source (architecture decisions).
rules: Partial compaction — unload tool results, keep project state
Project context carried forward via working_memory.json

mode_definitions.name: Synthesis / Creating New Wiki Page from Query Result
mode_definitions.context_definition: Answer contains novel insight → agent proposes saving as new page.
mode_definitions.trigger_condition: agent detects ≥3 wiki pages used for answer synthesis
mode_definitions.approval_rule: Never auto-create without explicit fixation flag (DR-4). Web-sourced data requires user approval.
rules: Compaction=false until page fixation in wiki
Context not carried forward — agent starts with snapshot.md

technical_calls.from_ingest: FLUSH_RAWS after extraction, read only pages to update
technical_calls.from_lint: Agent does NOT read wiki directly — only report from bash/Python script

steps: Update wiki/snapshot.md — add project to Active Projects

global_rule: Agent manages mode itself — flexible mechanism based on context, direct instruction, or clarification.

integration_with_memory.note: Work Modes determine WHEN to apply the rules defined in session_context_rules.json. Compaction=true/false controls which memory files are preserved across sessions.
